First feature release. Implements [Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern](https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f) as a Cowork plugin: build a personal knowledge base where the LLM does all the bookkeeping (summaries, cross-references, contradictions, consistency) while you stay in charge of sourcing and direction.

## What ships

### 4 skills

1. **`setup-claude-wiki`** — interview-driven vault scaffold. Asks language (日本語 / English) and which domains you want to track, helps you name top-level folders in your own vocabulary, writes only the minimum scaffold (one root index per top folder + one wiki-index and wiki-log per domain). No bundled templates, no domain presets.
2. **`add-page`** — Compile-tier ingest interview + Batch Approval Plan. Single source touches many pages per Karpathy Principle #5: page + index + log + bidirectional sync to peer pages, all approved in one batch. URL ingest via defuddle to `raw/`. Auto-detects new-domain creation when target domain doesn't exist yet.
3. **`lint-vault`** — schema / hygiene / structural lint with tier-based Batch Approval. 17 rules across A (schema, claude-wiki-specific), B (hygiene, kepano-delegated: orphans / dead-links / dead-ends / property anomalies), C (structural). File-level mode for ≤20 findings; rule-level mode (with `lint-report.md` dry-run snapshot) for >20.
4. **`query-wiki`** — hybrid index-first reading + grep fallback, markdown / comparison-table / Mermaid synthesis with mandatory inline `[[Page]]` citations. Auto-offers graduation back to wiki when the answer has reuse value (3+ sources synthesized, new framing, or likely re-asked) per Karpathy Principle #6 — the explored knowledge compounds into the wiki via `query→wiki` log entries.

### 2 hooks (auto-registered)

- **`obsidian-write-guard`** (PreToolUse): blocks `Write`/`Edit`/`NotebookEdit` and destructive `Bash` operations targeting the vault's `.obsidian/` directory. Override via `CLAUDE_WIKI_GUARD_DISABLE=1`.
- **`vault-first-reminder`** (SessionStart): injects the canonical Vault-First Consultation rule into Claude's context at session start — ensures Claude consults your vault first before reaching for general knowledge or web on substantive questions. Override via `CLAUDE_WIKI_VAULT_FIRST_DISABLE=1`.

### Bundled canonical schema

- **`CANONICAL.md`** at the plugin root — single source of truth referenced by every skill via `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/CANONICAL.md`. Distributed with the plugin so every user has the same schema. Includes the Vault-First rule, Sub-Wiki Criteria with the three reorganization paths (sub-domain split / `wiki/` orphan bucket / status-quo flat), Directory Depth Rule with sub-domain test, full frontmatter spec, ingest workflow, query graduation pattern.

## Requirements

- **Claude Desktop** (macOS or Windows) with **Cowork mode** (Pro / Max / Team / Enterprise plans)
- **[kepano/obsidian-skills](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills)** — **hard dependency**. Install via Cowork → Customize → `+` → Claude marketplace url → `https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-skills`. The plugin uses obsidian-cli, obsidian-markdown, and defuddle.
- **Obsidian app** running when invoking ingest/lint/query skills (so obsidian-cli can resolve the active vault). Setup skill does not require Obsidian to be running.

## Install

```
Cowork → Customize → + → Claude marketplace url:
https://github.com/jukiyak/claude-wiki-plugin
```

Then in chat:
- `set up claude-wiki` / `セットアップ` / `/setup-claude-wiki` — initial vault scaffold
- `add a page about X` / `X についてのページを追加して` / `/add-page` — ingest
- `lint vault` / `vault を lint` / `/lint-vault` — schema/hygiene/structural check
- `wiki に聞く: <question>` / `/query-wiki <question>` — cited synthesis with graduation

## Profile and roadmap

- **basic** (this release, v0.1.0) — interview-driven setup + Compile-tier ingest. All new pages default to `status: draft`. Single-tier ingest, manual verification, manual sub-wiki promotion via lint-vault findings.
- **pro** (v0.2.0+, planned) — Capture/Compile/Deep ingest tiers with domain auto-classification, `verified`-status auto-reset on edits, automatic sub-wiki scaffolding, JP↔EN migration skill.
- **v0.1.1+ candidates** — `daily-log` skill + Stop reminder hook (optional add-on for journaling), `UserPromptSubmit` proactive vault context injection (waiting on upstream Claude Code [Issue #10225](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/10225)), staleness lint, schema migration tooling.

## Localization

Plugin metadata + skill instructions are in English (so the plugin is discoverable globally). **Vault output is fully localized** — at first run, setup asks 日本語 / English. The choice applies to filenames, frontmatter keys, frontmatter values, and body text. A vault should not mix locales; v0.2.0+ will ship a migration skill.

## Verified

- 6 wiki pages dogfood end-to-end (setup → 6 add-page ingests → K₆ complete graph → query-wiki graduation → K₆ + composite map → lint-vault A8 closes related-mirroring loop)
- Hook scripts unit-tested locally (7 patterns each: write/edit, NotebookEdit, Bash redirect/rm/mv, env-var bypass, malformed JSON edge case)
- skill-creator review pass (dev.15) + holistic 2-agent review (dev.16 → dev.17 fixes)
